field_notes.id: The harness passes this string into official Identifier.parse(String); expected namespace/path encoding, packet id, and frame bytes are generated by the official jar.
field_notes.payload_source: The harness stores this value in an official CompoundTag; expected optional-tag encoding is generated by the official jar.
field_notes.payload_action: The harness stores this value in an official CompoundTag; expected optional-tag encoding is generated by the official jar.

stop_boundary: Proves Configuration serverbound custom_click_action packet framing and dispatch/decode only; do not infer UI behavior, command execution, interaction readiness, Configuration completion, or Play readiness.
